entries.description: Critical Strikes while holding a Fishing Rod
+1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects are instead Unexciting
Spells deal added Chaos Damage equal to 2% of your maximum Life
Gain 1 Vaal Soul per second
Buffs on you expire 30% slower
Reduced bonuses gained from Equipped Boots
Chance for Skills to not consume a Cooldown
Increased Global Defences
Increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills
Skills Chain +1 times
Reduced Mana Recovery from Flasks
Chance to Curse non-Cursed Enemies
Chance for Elemental Ailments to be inflicted on Minion
Increased Warcry Speed
Increased Attack Damage against Enemies with higher Life
More Attack speed with Offhand
Chance on reaching Low Life to recover to Full Life
Nova Spells Cast at a Marked target
Damage taken from Critical Strikes Recouped as Life
Increased Damage for each unlinked Socket
